Headline: #85A North Central Temporary Reroute near Touhy/Lehigh
ShortDescription: 85A North Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Touhy/Lehigh, due to street blockage near Touhy/Lehigh.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85A North Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Touhy/Lehigh, due to street blockage near Touhy/Lehigh.

Northbound buses will operate via Central, Touhy, Caldwell and Central over the normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via Central, Caldwell, Touhy, Central over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
